mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: No printer enrollment methods found in this batch. Batch 13 contains NotificationsPage, OssEmulatorPage, OverviewPage, PlanSelectorV3Page, and PrintHistoryPage. While OssEmulatorPage has extensive enrollment-related locators (serial_number, sku, uuid, cloud_id, fingerprint, registration_state), it does not have action methods to perform enrollment. The enrollment flow methods likely exist in other batches containing enrollment helper utilities or API methods.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription verification methods found in this batch. PrintHistoryPage has a free_months locator ([data-testid='free-months-message']) that can be used to verify the absence of free months message, but there is no verification method that checks subscription state. API helpers or verification utilities for checking subscription details likely exist in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods found in this batch. While OverviewPage has extensive subscription management locators (cancel_instant_ink, pause_plan_link, resume_plan_link), there are no methods to verify or set subscription status. API helpers for subscription status management likely exist in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Link to pause the Instant Ink subscription plan temporarily.
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: This precondition requires clicking a pause plan link to trigger the pause. This locator targets the pause plan link on the overview page, which matches the requirement to trigger pause plan before the test begins.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Modal dialog for pausing the subscription plan.
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: After clicking the pause plan link, a modal dialog appears. This locator targets that modal, which is part of the pause plan flow required by this precondition.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Dropdown to select the number of months to pause the plan.
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: Within the pause plan modal, users select how many months to pause. This locator targets that dropdown selector.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Button to confirm pausing the subscription plan.
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: After selecting pause duration, users click this button to confirm. This locator targets the confirmation button that completes the pause plan action required by this precondition.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Banner displayed when the plan is currently paused.
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: After pausing the plan, a banner confirms the paused state. This locator can be used to verify that the pause action completed successfully, fulfilling this precondition.

matched_page_objects.class_purpose: Encapsulates all UI elements and interactions for the main Overview/Dashboard page of the Instant Ink application. Contains 157 locators covering status cards, printer information, ink levels, plan details, billing, shipping, offers, privacy settings, and subscription management.
matched_page_objects.relevance_reason: Precondition 4 requires pausing the plan before the test begins. OverviewPage contains all the locators needed for the pause plan flow: pause_plan_link to initiate, pause_plan_modal for the dialog, pause_plan_dropdown to select duration, confirm_pause_plan to confirm, and plan_paused_banner to verify completion.

matched_page_objects.class_purpose: Encapsulates all UI elements and interactions for the Print History page where users view printing activity, billing history, invoices, and usage statistics. Contains 44 locators for page elements, progress bars, plan details, FAQ, billing cycle selector, and print history table.
matched_page_objects.relevance_reason: The test case is about the Billing Cycle Period card on the Print and Payment History page. PrintHistoryPage is the page object for this page and contains locators for progress bars (plan_pages_bar, trial_pages_bar, rollover_pages_bar), page usage text (total_printed_pages, plan_pages_text, rollover_pages_text, additional_pages_text), and billing information. These locators are relevant for verifying the expected results in steps 6, 8, 11, 14, 18, and 19.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Link to pause the Instant Ink subscription plan temporarily.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Precondition 4 requires clicking a pause plan link. This locator targets that link on the overview page.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Modal dialog for pausing the subscription plan.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Part of the pause plan flow required by precondition 4. This modal appears after clicking the pause plan link.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Dropdown to select the number of months to pause the plan.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Part of the pause plan flow for precondition 4. Users select pause duration from this dropdown.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Button to confirm pausing the subscription plan.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Completes the pause plan action required by precondition 4. This button confirms the pause.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Banner displayed when the plan is currently paused.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Verifies that precondition 4 (pause plan) was completed successfully. This banner confirms paused state.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Progress bar showing plan pages used out of monthly allocation.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 6 expected result requires verifying the Complimentary pages progress bar is displayed. Step 11 requires verifying the progress bar is filled with black color. Step 18 requires verifying the progress bar is 100% filled. This locator targets the plan pages progress bar which represents complimentary pages.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Progress bar showing trial pages used during trial period.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: While the test case focuses on complimentary and additional pages, the trial pages bar may also be present on the page. This locator can be used to verify the presence of multiple progress bars.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Progress bar showing rollover pages used from previous cycles.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Similar to trial pages bar, this may be present on the page alongside complimentary and additional pages bars.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Element displaying the total number of pages printed in the billing cycle.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 19 expected result requires verifying the total pages printed displays 15 pages. This locator targets the element that shows the total pages printed count.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Text values within the plan pages progress bar showing usage numbers.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 8 expected result requires verifying the complimentary pages value displays '0 of 10(Pause Plan) used'. Step 11 requires verifying '6 of 10 used'. Step 18 requires verifying '10 of 10 used'. This locator targets the text values within the plan pages progress bar.
May be present on the page alongside other page count text elements.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Text displaying additional pages purchased count.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 14 expected result requires verifying the additional pages value displays '5 of 10 used'. This locator targets the text showing additional pages count.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Message text about additional pages purchased beyond the plan.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Step 14 requires verifying additional pages progress bar and value. Step 17 requires verifying the message below Additional pages shows blocks bought. This locator targets the additional pages message text.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Message displaying information about free trial months.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: Precondition 2 requires ensuring no free months. This locator can be used to verify the absence of free months message on the print history page.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Input field displaying the selected billing cycle period.
matched_locators.relevance_reason: The test case is about the Billing Cycle Period card. This locator targets the billing cycle period selector which is part of that card.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Property method that returns a Playwright Locator object for the update plan link within the FAQ section. Calls self.page.locator() with the self.elements.update_plan_link selector to create a locator for the change plan link in the FAQ. Then calls .first on the locator to return only the first matching element.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: While not directly used in the test steps, this property provides access to the update plan link in the FAQ section of the print history page, which is part of the overall page context.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Property method that returns a Playwright Locator object for the plan price description text element. Calls self.page.locator() with the self.elements.plan_price_text selector to create a locator for the plan description element that displays plan pricing information. Then calls .first on the locator to return only the first matching element.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: Provides convenient access to plan pricing information on the print history page, which is part of the overall page context.
